creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
jgh         2012-04-14 19:27:43 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    math                 Makefile 
  Added files:
    math/py-viper        Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Add new port: math/py-viper
  
  Viper is a minimalistic scientific plotter and run-time visualization module.
  Viper has support for visualizing meshes and solutions in DOLFIN.
  
  WWW:    https://launchpad.net/fenics-viper
  
  PR:     ports/166913
  Submitted by:   jwbacon@tds.net
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.775     +1 -0      ports/math/Makefile
  1.1       +32 -0     ports/math/py-viper/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/math/py-viper/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/math/py-viper/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +43 -0     ports/math/py-viper/pkg-plist (new)
